prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall, Mira Ledgerfall, an androgynous cadre in a tailored navy cloak with gold trim and silver hair, stands before Kaelen Vane, a masculine frontline adventurer in reinforced leather armor and a bright scarf. Mira holds a leather-bound ledger and reaches out to adjust the strap on Kaelen's shoulder armor to ensure his tactical gear is secure. Bright, polished Japanese anime RPG aesthetic, bustling guild hall background, cinematic focus, no text, no watermarks.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; Mira finishes the armor adjustment and gives Kaelen a firm, encouraging nod. Kaelen, maintaining his confident stance, adjusts his mentor's bracer in return, signaling readiness. The two share a brief moment of silent, professional alignment before Kaelen turns toward the guild exit. Consistent character identities and camera, no text, no watermarks.
